summary: Most requested single-page sections and classic theme appear implemented (header smooth-scroll nav; Hero with Call/WhatsApp CTAs; Services/Why Choose Us/How It Works/Testimonials/Gallery/Contact; SEO title+meta description; classic serif+sansas typography and warm palette in frontend/src/index.css). However, the diff summary does not provide verifiable evidence that the required generated image assets are actually present under frontend/public/assets/generated, and the Contact section is truncated so the required “short note about services” cannot be confirmed as rendered.

missing_requirements.requirement: Contact section includes a short note about services (in addition to phone/WhatsApp/address/hours) and simple contact actions, with no map embed.
missing_requirements.reason: ContactSection.tsx is truncated; while businessInfo.servicesNote exists in siteContent.ts, the diff does not show it being rendered in the Contact section UI.

missing_requirements.requirement: All required generated images exist under frontend/public/assets/generated and are referenced via static paths.
missing_requirements.reason: Components reference /assets/generated/... image paths (e.g., hero image), but the diff summary does not show the generated image files under frontend/public/assets/generated (two added files are omitted due to limits and no assets directory listing is provided). Therefore, asset existence cannot be verified from the provided diff summary.
evidence: File diff summary: "Omitted files due to limits: added=2" (possible missing asset evidence)

hallucinated_features.description: Backend canister file added (empty actor) despite the request being strictly for a frontend marketing page and explicitly requiring no backend code for image serving.
hallucinated_features.reason: BuildRequest requirements are all frontend-focused; adding backend/main.mo is not requested and is unrelated to the static-asset requirement.

hallucinated_features.description: Footer includes social media icon links (Facebook/Instagram/X) and a 'caffeine.ai' attribution link.
hallucinated_features.reason: Not requested in any REQ; extra functionality/content beyond specified sections and actions.
